runbooks.title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
steps: 1. Check active connections: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity
2. Kill idle connections older than 5 min
3. Increase pool size in config: DB_POOL_MAX=30

runbooks.title: Service Timeout / High Latency
steps: 1. Check CPU and memory usage on affected service
2. Review recent deployments in last 2 hours
5. Rollback if issue started after deployment

runbooks.title: Cascading Service Failure
steps: 1. Identify root cause service (first failure in logs)
2. Isolate affected service with circuit breaker
4. Fix root cause first, then restore dependents
